sglang.title: MLA prefill w/o weight absorption
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For large batch sizes, not using weight absorption in the MLA prefill phase will be more efficient.
python3 -m sglang.bench_one_batch --batch-size 128 --input 512 --output 1 --model neuralmagic/DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Instruct-FP8 --trust-remote-code --tp 8 --disable-cuda-graph

# prefill w/o a

sglang.title: Check gpu availability at server args creation
sglang.author: MrAta
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
During server args construction we check the gpu memory size to configure knobs like chunked prefill and cuda graph sizes.
For use cases where the args are constructed programmatically on a non-GPU environment and sent to a GPU environment, this fails because we use nvidia-smi to check nv

sglang.title: Make torch TP composable with torch.compile
sglang.author: kwen2501

sglang.title: move apply_torchao_config_ to model_runner
sglang.author: jerryzh168
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Previously we need to apply_torchao_config_ to each model manually, this PR changes it to run on the entire model, we can also add autoquant in the future
Test Plan:
llama:
python3 -m sglang.bench_one_batch --model meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B --batch-size 1 --input 128 --output 8 --json-mode

sglang.title: [Minor] Code style improvements
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Improve logging messages and code style

vllm.title: [bugfix] fixed parameter “n” not work when set parameter “bestof” > 1
vllm.author: o2363286
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[bugfix] fixed parameter “n” not work when set parameter “bestof” > 1
this PR fixed parameter “n” not work when set parameter “bestof” > 1. the key reason is that the class SamplingParams‘s clone() function will result in  SamplingParams‘s post_init() function invoked again.

vllm.title: [ci/build] Update vLLM postmerge ECR repo
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We recently changed the ECR for all images built on main branch to be in vllm-ci-postmerge-repo instead of vllm-ci-test-repo (which is now for premerge runs on untrusted code)
This is to change vllm-ci-test-repo to vllm-ci-postmerge-repo in some places that use these postmerge images.

vllm.title: [LoRA] Change lora_tokenizers capacity
vllm.author: xyang16
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently lora_tokenizers capacity is max_num_seqs. This is fine if max_loras is smaller than max_num_seqs.
But if max_loras is greater than max_num_seqs, lora_tokenizers should have capacity=max_loras, just like active_adapters LoRALRUCache have capacity=max_loras. If not, items in active_adapters

vllm.title: [Model] Consolidate ViTs attention implementation without mask
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a MultiHeadAttention layer to consolidate existing duplicate attention forward implementation in ViTs.
ViTs that use attention mask are not modified: Qwen2-VL, Pixtral, Mllama.

vllm.title: Benchmark serving structured output
vllm.author: xuechendi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Test with
python benchmarks/benchmark_serving_guided.py --port 8080 --model meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct --dataset xgrammar_bench --request-rate 32 --backend openai-chat --endpoint /v1/chat/completions --output-len 512 --num-prompts 128 --guided-decoding-ratio 1.0 --save-results

or
python bench

vllm.title: [CI/Build] improve python-only dev setup
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current process for python-only development and/or builds is kinda painful.
With this PR I'm trying to resurrect the VLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED env var to skip extension compilation and make the overall process easier.
The overall idea is to include the compiled libraries from the nightly wheel in the

vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #10891
Thanks @ywang96 for investigating the bug and pinpointing the source of the bug.

vllm.title: [benchmark] Make H100 benchmark optional
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: H100 machine is taken down for 1 week per https://vllm-dev.slack.com/archives/C07R5PAL2L9/p1733360366864159

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fallback to outlines for complex json schemas
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
XGrammar doesn't support JSON schemas with complex rules involved regex patterns or numeric ranges, as reported by @joennlae in #10785 (comment)
There is a WIP PR on XGrammar to resolve this (mlc-ai/xgrammar#106) but in the meantime we will fallback to outlines.

vllm.title: [Doc] Create a new "Usage" section
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some of the pages under "Serving" and "Models" aren't really related to their parent section. This PR creates a new "Usage" section to accommodate these pages.
@simon-mo can you help set up redirects as requested in #10428? Done

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix BNB loader target_modules
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When addressing the following TODO, I found a misconception regarding the use of target_modules. The issue arises because target_modules specifies which layers should have LoRA adapters added, rather than which layers should be quantized.

  
    
      vllm/vllm/model_executor/model_load

vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update the example chat template to support using a system prompt with images:

remove the exception raised if sending a system message and images
when prompting with an image, render the system message if the user supplied a prompt or if tools are requested

The coresponding change was recently mad
